title: Promega GoTaq Green Master Mix PCR
description: Promega GoTaq Green Master Mix (2X): 50 uL standard reaction, direct-to-gel, with a 95 C denaturation.

payload.notes: Vendor: Promega, GoTaq Green Master Mix 2X (Cat. M7122). 1X provides 1.5 mM MgCl2 and 200 uM each dNTP; the blue and yellow tracking dyes let you load the mix directly on a gel. Annealing: start ~5 C below the lower-Tm primer and raise in 1 C steps (Promega BioMath calculator). The 55 C shown is a placeholder starting point. Primers 0.1-1.0 uM. Cycles 25-30 (up to 40). Extension ~1 min/kb at 72-74 C. Preheat the cycler to 95 C before loading. Source: https://www.promega.com/-/media/files/resources/protocols/product-information-sheets/g/gotaq-green-master-mix-protocol.pdf
